title: selaginella dregei var. welwitschiana
intro: Selaginella dregei var. welwitschiana, also known as the Welwitsch's spikemoss or Selaginella, is a species of spore-bearing plant in the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Selaginella dregei var. welwitschiana include treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Selaginella dregei var. welwitschiana can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or mixing the plant with other herbs to create a tincture or decoction.
